Response 220035812

The ASU Representative Office in Indonesia Implemented the Green Chemistry Workshop

Community Engagement (CE) - source indicates reciprocal or jointly beneficial collaboration.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

The ASU Representative Office in Indonesia implemented the Green Chemistry Workshops, engaging nearly 200 students, pre-service teachers, and educators from two partner universities to advance sustainable chemistry education through hands-on, low-waste laboratory training and cross-sector collabo...

Question

Start Date

2025-07-01 (inferred from FY26 survey window)

2026-06-30 (inferred from FY26 survey window)

Question
